rule_metadata.name: eicar_av_test
rule_metadata.description: This is a standard AV test, intended to verify that BinaryAlert is working correctly.
rule_metadata.author: Austin Byers | Airbnb CSIRT

rules.rule_text:
rule eicar_av_test
{
	meta:
		description = "This is a standard AV test, intended to verify that BinaryAlert is working correctly."
		author = "Austin Byers | Airbnb CSIRT"
		reference = "http://www.eicar.org/86-0-Intended-use.html"

	strings:
		$eicar_regex = /^X5O!P%@AP\[4\\PZX54\(P\^\)7CC\)7\}\$EICAR-STANDARD-ANTIVIRUS-TEST-FILE!\$H\+H\*\s*$/

	condition:
		$eicar_regex
}
